scenes.title: The Kitchen Distraction
scenes.background_prompt: A kitchen with a counter, a toaster, a coffee maker, a fruit bowl, and a window with morning light. No people.
scenes.full_scene_prompt: A kitchen in bright morning light. A woman in a bathrobe and slippers stands near the counter, holding a phone to her ear with one hand, laughing at something the caller said, completely absorbed in conversation. She faces away from the counter. Behind her, a chrome toaster sits on the counter with two slices of bread — both have risen well past golden and are turning dark brown, almost black. Thin wisps of gray smoke curl upward from the toaster slots, catching the morning light from the window. The woman is completely unaware. A coffee maker beside the toaster shows a full pot. A fruit bowl with bananas and oranges sits nearby. A wall clock reads 7:45 AM. The smoke is not yet alarming but clearly about to be.
scenes.composition_instructions: Place woman near the counter, standing with phone to ear, laughing, completely absorbed, facing away from the toaster. Behind her, the toaster has two slices turned dark brown with thin gray smoke curling upward from the slots.
scenes.scene_description: In the bottom left foreground, a rectangular rug with horizontal stripes of red, orange, tan, and green and small tassels on its right edge lies on a light brown wooden plank floor. Behind the rug, a set of green kitchen cabinets runs along the wall, featuring three wooden doors with vertical grain and small round brass knobs. Above the left side of the cabinets, a large, thick-framed wooden window with a rounded top looks out onto a bright blue sky with white clouds and several rounded, stylized trees in shades of orange and green, suggesting a clear daytime setting. On the wooden countertop to the right of the window, a green toaster with a silver base and a black lever holds two slices of dark brown toast, with several wisps of grey smoke curling upward from the slots. To the right of the toaster sits a black drip coffee maker with a glass carafe partially filled with dark coffee. Further right on the counter is a small blue bowl containing a bunch of yellow bananas and several round orange fruits. Standing in the right foreground on the wooden floor is a woman with shoulder-length brown hair. She wears a yellow long-sleeved sweater over a light blue patterned collared shirt, brown trousers, and green shoes. She is turned toward the right, holding a red smartphone to her ear with her right hand, her eyes closed in a smile as she talks. The wall behind the countertop is covered in light yellow square tiles, and above the tiles are dark brown wooden upper cabinets. The green base cabinets continue behind the woman to the right edge of the frame.

S: sunny kitchen with a large window
wooden floor with a striped rug
IE: toast is burning in the toaster
woman is talking on her phone
IR: woman is unaware of the smoke
P: to make breakfast in the kitchen
CO: smoke rising from the green toaster

ENP: colorful striped rug on the floor
red smartphone held to her ear
dark brown toast inside the toaster
SC: while she talks on the phone
